title: eryngium longifolium
intro: Eryngium longifolium, also known as Raisin Plant or Button Snakeroot, is a perennial plant in the carrot family, native to North America. Its roots and stems have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. Eryngium longifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
